creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191765
libreoffice ports build patch

With the attached patch (apply it against your ports tree) I can build editors/libreoffice (6.0.2).

The patch against files/patch-solenv_gbuild_platform_unxgcc.mk may be unnecessary, but I don't want to spend another 13 hours to find out.
